caption: I was hesitant to share this, and I still am. It feels like those “what’s on your mind?” kinda posts from Facebook back in the day (IFYKYK). It’s rare for my Instagram to have something so real, sad, and which is not just another reel. This isn’t a breakup story, just a girl trying to find true love in this f*cked up dating scenario, especially in a place like Delhi. Sometimes, I wonder if it’s bravery or just sheer foolishness to put yourself out there, to let someone else hold that much power over you, hoping they won’t crush it, and to be vulnerable, only to end up going nowhere. I feel exhausted and am losing hope to find the kind of love I desire (and deserve.) The best part is that—I know, no matter how dark it feels right now, I will be okay and reach a neutral place because I am the BIG girl from a small town, living in a big city, and who knows how to take care of herself. However, sadly, I don’t always wish to be that strong independent woman who faces life head-on, guides herself out of emotional turmoil, heals, and then finds the courage to do it all over again. But, I NEED to because I refuse to settle for the bare minimum. So, the bigger question is, will this be worth it? Absolutely! If this brings me the kind of care and love that feels safe, valued, respected, desired, and fosters growth and satisfaction. But, the mind plays games, and the question arises yet again, “What if it doesn’t?” And I ask myself, “Are you that person, who gives up so easily?” The answer is a resounding, NO. So, I gather myself, piece by piece, day by day. Even if today feels impossible, I may take as small a step as going to the gym, lifting some weights, and letting my heart out while stretching my sore body after an intense workout session.
Can someone explain this to me??

The reality is a lot less glamorous—measuring butter, hitting protein goals, dragging myself through workouts, and staying consistent even when I don’t feel like it. Day 2\/45 ✅ No shortcuts. No magic fixes. Just showing up every day and trusting the process. #45DayChallenge #AbsJourney #FitnessJourney #CalorieDeficit #ProteinGoals LegDay ConsistencyOverPerfection

Instagram vs Reality ✨ This is where I started. This is what I’m aiming for. And this is where I am right now. Social media can make everything look perfect — the angles, the poses, the lighting. But reality? I still have lower belly fat, bloating days, insecurities, and moments where I don’t feel my best. And that’s okay. 45 days I am going to stop chasing “perfect” and start chasing consistency instead. This journey is not about becoming unrecognizable. It’s about becoming stronger, healthier, and more confident in my own skin. No filters. No unrealistic expectations. Just progress.  #45DayChallenge #AbsJourney #InstagramVsReality #FitnessJourney #RealBody

“Perfect body” - What if I told you that what you see online is just a snapshot of a moment—not the whole story? We all get caught up in the illusion of the ‘perfect body’ we see on Instagram—the angles, the poses, the highlight reel. But here’s the truth: I do have stomach fat, lower body fat, and I’m working on it—every day. My Instagram might not always show that reality, but this journey is mine. Your day one doesn’t have to look like anyone else’s. Let’s stop hollow comparisons and remember: we’re all on different paths, and that’s okay. . #reelvsreality #ɢʏᴍɢɪʀʟ #instagramlife #reallife #stomachfat
Mountains have always been the solution for all my problems. An escape that recharges and just give you a perspective, which literally resets my life.
What do you have to say? . . . . [date night, relatable, planning date, date night ideas, couple goals]

I think this is the one I like the most Yes, of course, I am posing I’m a little bit shy when I look straight But I can also pierce through your heart Just some more posing And another one, I’m posing like I’m thinking, Deep And the last one with an awkward smile

Imagine waking up tomorrow and feeling completely at home in yourself; no masks, no apologies, just the version of you, you love most. This is the power of choosing yourself, even if that version doesn’t fit neatly into society’s boxes. You don’t have to shrink, hide, or pretend. You thrive when you embrace who you are, flaws and all. The world might not always understand you, but that doesn’t matter. What matters is the story you choose to live. A story of courage, growth, and unapologetic self-love. So, take that step, keep growing, and remember: your life is yours to shape, one fearless choice at a time.
Instagram driving me crazy with its killer filter, honestly. . . . . . . . . [filter, viral filter, trending, sexy navel, trending audio, fit body, slim waste line]
Building, Rebuilding and growing. You always stand back up.
